Removed_Other.purpose: Improves visual quality of materials in games, making them look better and more polished.

Added_Other.name: DFFlagCurveAnimationNullChildrenCheck
Added_Other.mechanism: Checks for null children in curve animations to prevent errors.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances animation stability, ensuring smoother gameplay experiences.

Added_Physics.name: FFlagLuauUseWorkspacePropToChooseSolver
Added_Physics.mechanism: Utilizes a property in the workspace to select a calculation method.
Added_Physics.purpose: Enhances performance and accuracy of game physics and interactions for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a dynamic string to represent the current version of the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and ensure players have the latest game features.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are processed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the performance and accuracy of time-related strings in games.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and efficiency in tracking changes in the code.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are handled in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and speed when displaying time-related information.
